web.title: Automate TikTok Video Creation with AI Using Shotstack
web.description: In this guide, we'll show you how to use Shotstack to create dynamic, faceless TikTok videos. In this text-to-video workflow we create a video and send it to ...
web.markdown:
# Automate TikTok Video Creation with AI Using Shotstack

In this guide, we’ll show you how to use Shotstack to create dynamic, faceless TikTok videos. In this text-to-video workflow we create a video and send it to Tiktok with a single API call.

### Prerequisites

Before diving in, ensure you have the following:

- Shotstack Account: [Sign up for a free account](https://dashboard.shotstack.io/register) at Shotstack.
- TikTok Account: Make sure you have an active TikTok account.
- API Access: Familiarity with making API calls.

### The Workflow

Here’s a high-level overview of what we’ll do:

1. Create a Video Template: Design a template for faceless TikTok videos using AI.
2. Connect to TikTok: Allow Shotstack to upload videos to your TikTok account.
3. Automate Video Rendering: Use a single API call to create a unique video and upload it straight to TikTok.

### Creating a Shotstack Template

First, create a video template in the [Shotstack Studio](https://dashboard.shotstack.io/studio/overview). Like other video editing tools, you can browse the template library or start from scratch. For this guide, we’ll create a new template optimized for TikTok automation.

![create a new Shotstack template](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/files/new_template_02cee954f6.gif)

Set the video aspect ratio to 9:16 with a 720p resolution to suit TikTok’s format.

![Set your video resolution](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/files/resolution_93b3020f4e.gif)

We’ll create a faceless Tiktok video featuring 10 AI-generated images with effects. We’ll overlay an AI-generated voiceover discussing a topic of your choice.

#### Create 10 Text-to-Image Clips

Add 10 text-to-image clips to the timeline, each lasting 5 seconds. Arrange them across two tracks to create a dissolve transition between each clip.

To add the dissolve transitions and effects, apply them to each text-to-image clip.

#### Add a Text-to-Speech Voiceover

Next, add a text-to-speech clip for the voiceover. We’ll use the “Amy” voice for this example.

#### Create Auto-Generated Captions

You can automatically add captions to your video by clicking on the “Add Auto Captions” button.

![Click on the Add Auto Caption button to automatically add captions to your video](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/add_auto_caption_efc3e81104.jpg)

Style the captions to match your video’s aesthetic. Choose from various styling options such as borders, background color, fonts, and size.

### Timing Your Clips

Generated voiceovers don’t have a fixed length, so we can’t set a fixed duration for the clip. Instead, use the auto duration. This ensures the clip’s length matches the generated audio.

![Set your clip length to auto to make it last as long as the source audio file](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/Social_Media_Automation_Tik_Tok_Guide_Auto_47ce6635ae.png)

We need to ensure there’s always an image showing throughout the audio playing. We do this by setting the length of the final text-to-image clip to `end`. This makes the last image stay on screen until the voiceover concludes.

![Set your clip length to end to make it last until the end of the timeline](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/Social_Media_Automation_End_4411e24626.png)

### Setting Up Merge Fields

To replace prompts and the voiceover text, set up merge fields. Merge fields allow you to add placeholders that can be replaced with your own data.

We need unique merge fields for each image prompt and one for the voiceover.

You can use [these prompts](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZXT-pocMBU7uDUle81jbbRQHSmEHP0ykn8_K7nS3T9g/edit?gid=0#gid=0) or use your own.

![Create your merge fields](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/merge_fields_d317038ec3.png)

When you’ve set your merge fields make sure to reference them in your clips.

![Add your merge fields to your clips](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/merge_fields_2_e47ea814f9.jpg)

### Preview Your Video

To see how your video looks, create a preview by clicking on the Preview button.

![Preview your video before automating it](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/preview_a259f2121a.jpg)

### Connecting to Your TikTok Account

With your template ready, we will now connect it to your TikTok account. Go to the Connect tab and click on Connect next to the TikTok destination.

![Connect Shotstack to your TikTok account](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/connect_to_tiktok_67119c4c2a.jpg)

Allow Shotstack to upload videos to TikTok on your behalf.

![Authorise Shotstack to upload to TikTok](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/authorise_tiktok_8aadec41d9.jpg)

### Automate with a Single API Call

With your TikTok account connected, your automation setup is complete. Click on the Automate tab to view your API request.

Click on Send Request, and your video will be rendered and sent to TikTok.

![Click the Send Request button to send your request to the Shotstack API](https://d2jn8jtjz02j0j.cloudfront.net/images/origin/automate_90b6df58d3.jpg)

Open the TikTok app on your phone and navigate to your inbox. You’ll see an uploaded video from Shotstack, ready for you to edit and post.

Note: The video will not show on TikTok on your desktop. Only the mobile app is supported.

### Conclusion

With a Shotstack template, you can create thousands of videos using just one API call. The system automatically generates unique images and voiceovers based on your instructions. Plus, by linking your template to your TikTok account, these videos are uploaded to TikTok automatically.

### Get started with Shotstack's video editing API in two steps:

1. **[Sign up for free](https://dashboard.shotstack.io/register)** to get your API key.
2. **Send an API request** to create your video:




```
curl --request POST 'https://api.shotstack.io/v1/render' \
   --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \
   --data-raw '{
     "timeline": {
       "tracks": [\
         {\
           "clips": [\
             {\
               "asset": {\
                 "type": "video",\
                 "src": "https://shotstack-assets.s3.amazonaws.com/footage/beach-overhead.mp4"\
               },\
               "start": 0,\
               "length": "auto"\
             }\
           ]\
         }\
       ]
     },
     "output": {
       "format": "mp4",
       "size": {
         "width": 1280,
         "height": 720
       }
     }
}'
```

# CapCut AI TikTok Video Generator

Create scroll-stopping short videos with CapCut's AI TikTok video generator, which is the smarter way to follow trends, showcase products, and share stories that keep your audience engaged.

![tiktok_logo](https://sf16-web-tos-buz.capcutcdn-us.com/obj/capcut-web-buz-tx/common/images/tiktok_logo.png)

![mobile legends](https://sf16-web-tos-buz.capcutcdn-us.com/obj/capcut-web-buz-tx/common/images/logo-2.png)

![nvidia](https://sf16-web-tos-buz.capcutcdn-us.com/obj/capcut-web-buz-tx/common/images/logo-3.png)

## Features of CapCut's AI TikTok video generator

![ Create viral TikTok videos instantly using CapCut's free AI TikTok video generator.](https://p16-seeyou-useast5.capcutcdn-us.com/tos-useast5-i-2zwwjm3azk-tx/d0b30bd8c7fe48e681a40d9b690315ea~tplv-2zwwjm3azk-image.image)

### **Create TikToks from any ideas with AI**

Keep your content fresh and on-trend with CapCut's [AI video maker](https://www.capcut.com/tools/ai-video-maker). Simply input your script, and the tool will transform it into a polished video. Combine it with trending themes, effects, and [transitions](https://www.capcut.com/tools/free-video-transitions) to ensure every post stands out.

[Download for free](https://www.capcut.com/activity/download_pc?__position__=others)

![ Customize TikTok videos easily with CapCut's TikTok AI video generator templates](https://p16-seeyou-useast5.capcutcdn-us.com/tos-useast5-i-2zwwjm3azk-tx/37a5e906af0045b4a2e827e8f57fefb9~tplv-2zwwjm3azk-image.image)

### **Create videos with customizable TikTok templates**

CapCut's TikTok AI video generator templates let users customize their videos by choosing from a variety of styles, including realistic film, cartoon 3D, cinematic, and more, as well as selecting [AI voices](https://www.capcut.com/tools/ai-voice-generator) like Lady Holiday, Cheeky Commentator, and more. It also offers a wide range of [AI avatars](https://www.capcut.com/tools/ai-avatar) and [video templates](https://www.capcut.com/templates), significantly speeding up the content creation process.

A TikTok video generator with AI is a tool that uses artificial intelligence to create engaging TikTok videos automatically. By inputting trends and themes, the AI can generate videos that are visually appealing on TikTok.

CapCut is widely regarded as one of the best AI video generators for TikTok. Creating a TikTok video with photos and videos using CapCut is simple. First, import your photos and videos into the CapCut editor. Then, arrange them in your desired sequence on the timeline. Use CapCut's editing tools to add effects, transitions, and background music to enhance your video.

## Want to know more?

What is an AI TikTok video generator?

![collapse](https://web-assets.invideo.io/common/prod/icons/rounded-close.svg)

An AI TikTok video generator helps you create short-form TikTok videos using a simple prompt. It automates the script, visuals, music, and editing—no filming required.

How do I create a TikTok video with invideo AI?

![collapse](https://web-assets.invideo.io/common/prod/icons/rounded-close.svg)

Simply enter your TikTok video idea as a prompt, and invideo AI will automatically generate a script, generate visuals, add music, and create a complete TikTok-style video.

Can I create TikTok videos without being on camera?

![collapse](https://web-assets.invideo.io/common/prod/icons/rounded-close.svg)

Yes. Invideo AI generates faceless TikTok videos using generative media, stock footage, and AI voiceovers—perfect for creators who prefer to stay off camera.

Can I choose the music and style of my video?

![collapse](https://web-assets.invideo.io/common/prod/icons/rounded-close.svg)

Yes, you can specify the tone, type of content, and style in your prompt, including the kind of background music you want.

How long does it take to generate a TikTok video?

![collapse](https://web-assets.invideo.io/common/prod/icons/rounded-close.svg)

Once you enter your prompt and choose the settings, invideo AI will create a ready-to-publish TikTok video in just a few minutes.
